title: China Chronicle Evidence Passport
description: One auditable statement about the evidentiary limits of a source used for an event-ledger record.

ledger_id.description: The unchanged id of the related event-ledger row.

source_locator.description: A retrievable citation, such as work and chapter, document or slip number, object number, plate, page, or archive identifier.

source_caveat.description: A specific statement of the evidence's limits, textual history, provenance, representativeness, or unresolved disagreement.
